metadata.description: Steakhouse Prime USDC is a Morpho MetaMorpho vault on Base that allocates USDC deposits across six Morpho Blue lending markets to generate yield for depositors. The vault is curated by Steakhouse Financial under the standardized MetaMorpho v1.1 contract, with a 7-day timelock on cap changes and an Aragon OSx DAO holding the guardian veto. Capital deployment relies entirely on Morpho Blue, and per-market collateral pricing depends on a fleet of Chainlink price feeds wrapped by MorphoChainlinkOracleV2 adapters.

admins.name: Steakhouse 5/8 Owner Multisig
admins.description: Primary vault owner multisig (5-of-8 threshold, 63% approval). Controls all critical vault parameters including curator and allocator designation (setCurator, setIsAllocator), fee configuration (setFee, setFeeRecipient), skim recipient management (setSkimRecipient), and initiation of timelock-protected governance changes (submitTimelock, submitGuardian). Can manage market caps and removals (submitCap, submitMarketRemoval), configure supply and withdrawal queues (setSupplyQueue, updateWithdrawQueue), execute fund reallocations (reallocate), and revoke pending governance proposals (revokePendingTimelock, revokePendingGuardian, revokePendingCap, revokePendingMarketRemoval). Owner transfer is two-step (Ownable2Step) but uncapped.

mitigations.description: Timelock can only be set in [1, 14] days

admins.name: Steakhouse 2/6 Curator Multisig
admins.description: Designated curator multisig (2-of-6 threshold, 33% approval). Controls market cap submissions (submitCap) and market removal requests (submitMarketRemoval), both subject to the 7-day vault timelock. Manages supply and withdrawal queue configuration (setSupplyQueue, updateWithdrawQueue) and can execute fund reallocations between markets (reallocate). Can revoke pending cap changes and market removals (revokePendingCap, revokePendingMarketRemoval) without delay.

admins.name: Allocator EOA (0xfeed...c9a)
admins.description: Designated allocator EOA with the same permissions as the allocator multisig: can update supply and withdrawal queues and trigger reallocations within the cap envelope already approved by the curator. Operates as part of the vault's automated rebalancing system.

admins.name: Allocator 1/5 Multisig
admins.description: Designated allocator multisig (1-of-5 threshold, 20% approval) with permissions to manage supply and withdrawal queues (setSupplyQueue, updateWithdrawQueue) and execute reallocations (reallocate). Reallocations are bounded to markets that already have a non-zero cap submitted via the timelocked submitCap path, so the allocator cannot move funds into unapproved markets.

admins.name: Steakhouse Aragon OSx DAO (Guardian)
admins.description: Aragon OSx DAO (v1.4.0) installed as the vault guardian. Has emergency veto power over every timelocked change initiated by the owner: can revoke pending timelock updates (revokePendingTimelock), guardian replacements (revokePendingGuardian), market cap changes (revokePendingCap), and market removals (revokePendingMarketRemoval). Cannot initiate any change itself; acts as a pure cancel-only check on owner actions during their 7-day delay window.

dependencies.name: MorphoHelper
dependencies.description: Morpho ecosystem helper contract used by the vault for allocator-side automation. Operates within the vault's existing per-market caps to manage queues and reallocations.

dependencies.name: Chainlink Price Feed
dependencies.description: Chainlink EACAggregatorProxy used by one of the vault's per-market MorphoChainlinkOracleV2 adapters to value collateral. Reliability of this feed directly affects liquidation timing on the corresponding Morpho Blue market.

mitigations.label: Per-market cap
mitigations.description: Prices a single market only. Exposure bounded by that market's USDC supply cap.

mitigations.label: Per-market cap
mitigations.description: Prices a single market only. Exposure bounded by that market's USDC supply cap.

dependencies.name: Chainlink cbBTC/USD Price Feed
dependencies.description: Chainlink EACAggregatorProxy providing cbBTC/USD price data, consumed by the cbBTC-market oracle adapter. Anchors collateral valuation in the vault's BTC-denominated market.

mitigations.label: Per-market cap
mitigations.description: Prices the cbBTC market only. Capital exposure under feed failure is bounded by that market's USDC supply cap.

mitigations.label: Per-market cap
mitigations.description: Prices the cbBTC market only. Capital exposure under feed failure is bounded by that market's USDC supply cap.

dependencies.name: Chainlink USDC/USD Price Feed
dependencies.description: Chainlink EACAggregatorProxy providing USDC/USD price data, used as the quote-side feed for several of the vault's per-market oracle adapters.

mitigations.label: Per-market cap
mitigations.description: Quote feed shared across multiple markets. Exposure bounded by the sum of those markets' USDC supply caps.

mitigations.label: Per-market cap
mitigations.description: Quote feed shared across multiple markets. Exposure bounded by the sum of those markets' USDC supply caps.

dependencies.name: Chainlink USD Price Feed (Quote)
dependencies.description: Chainlink EACAggregatorProxy used as the quote-side price feed in several MorphoChainlinkOracleV2 adapters that price collateral against USD. Underpins valuation accuracy on multiple vault markets.

mitigations.label: Per-market cap
mitigations.description: USD reference feed shared across multiple markets. Exposure bounded by the sum of those markets' USDC supply caps.

mitigations.label: Per-market cap
mitigations.description: USD reference feed shared across multiple markets. Exposure bounded by the sum of those markets' USDC supply caps.

dependencies.name: Chainlink Price Feed
dependencies.description: Chainlink EACAggregatorProxy consumed by one of the vault's per-market oracle adapters as a base-asset feed. Reliability affects collateral pricing on the corresponding Morpho Blue market.

mitigations.label: Per-market cap
mitigations.description: Prices a single market only. Exposure bounded by that market's USDC supply cap.

mitigations.label: Per-market cap
mitigations.description: Prices a single market only. Exposure bounded by that market's USDC supply cap.

dependencies.name: Chainlink Price Feed
dependencies.description: Chainlink EACAggregatorProxy whose underlying aggregator is an AccessControlledOCR2Aggregator. Consumed by a MorphoChainlinkOracleV2 adapter for one of the vault's markets.

mitigations.label: Per-market cap
mitigations.description: Prices a single market only. Exposure bounded by that market's USDC supply cap.

mitigations.label: Per-market cap
mitigations.description: Prices a single market only. Exposure bounded by that market's USDC supply cap.

dependencies.name: Morpho Blue
dependencies.description: Core lending protocol where all vault deposits are allocated across six markets. The vault supplies USDC to Morpho Blue lending markets, making it the fundamental dependency for capital deployment, yield generation, and withdrawal operations. All vault positions, reallocations, and accounting interact directly with Morpho Blue.

dependencies.name: PublicAllocator
dependencies.description: Morpho protocol contract permitting permissionless reallocation of vault funds within curator-set bounds. The vault depends on PublicAllocator for automated capital optimization across markets without requiring manual multisig action.

funds.name: MetaMorpho Vault (steakUSDC)
funds.description: Main vault contract holding all depositor USDC. Assets are deployed across six Morpho Blue lending markets selected by the curator, generating yield through optimized capital allocation. The vault is immutable (MetaMorpho v1.1) and uses a 7-day timelock with guardian veto on all market and governance changes. Holds $102.12 in tokens and $472.51M in active Morpho Blue lending positions.

mitigations.description: Timelock can only be set in [1, 14] days

governance.votingProcess: An Aragon OSx DAO (v1.4.0) is the vault guardian and can veto the timelocked actions.
